app.name: OCADYN
app.tagline: Track products. Buy at the right time.

landing.heroTitle: Smart price tracking for every marketplace
landing.heroSubtitle: Paste a product URL, set your alert rules, and never miss a price drop again.
landing.membersRequired: Create a free account to track prices. Tracking is available for registered members only.

features.title: Everything you need to buy at the right price
features.subtitle: A modern dashboard built for shoppers who want clarity, not clutter.

url.title: Paste any product URL
url.description: Add products from Amazon, Trendyol, Hepsiburada, and more in seconds.

alerts.title: Flexible alert rules
alerts.description: Email, SMS, call, or push — with percentage and fixed amount triggers.

tracking.title: Real-time tracking
tracking.description: See price drops, increases, and history on a clean timeline.

reports.title: Savings reports
reports.description: Understand how much you save over time with visual analytics.

preview.title: Your command center for prices
preview.subtitle: Track every product in one place with stats, alerts, and history at a glance.

points.stats: Overview cards for total, dropped, and increased prices
points.alerts: Notification center for every price change

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more products and faster checks.

a.quote: OCADYN saved me over $200 on electronics last quarter. The alerts are spot on.
a.name: Sarah K.

b.quote: Finally one dashboard for Trendyol and Amazon. Setup took two minutes.
b.name: Mehmet A.

c.quote: The price history chart helped me decide exactly when to buy.
c.name: James L.

account.q: Do I need an account to track prices?
account.a: Yes. Price tracking is available for registered members only. Create a free account to get started.

track.q: How do I add a product?
track.a: Sign in, go to your dashboard, paste the product URL, and configure your alert preferences on the product page.

alerts.a: You choose the frequency: hourly, every 6 or 12 hours, daily, or weekly — per product.

pricing.a: Yes. The Free plan includes up to 5 products with email alerts and daily checks.

cta.title: Ready to never overpay again?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of members tracking prices smarter.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your tracked products and alerts.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Register to start tracking prices across marketplaces.

errors.invalidCredentials: Please enter a valid email and password.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.registrationFailed: Registration failed. Please check your details.

dashboard.homeSubtitle: Track prices, get alerts, and save on every purchase.

quickAdd.title: Track a product
quickAdd.description: Paste a product URL from Amazon, Trendyol, N11, or Walmart.
quickAdd.unsupportedMarketplace: This store is not supported yet. Supported stores: Amazon, Trendyol, N11, Walmart.

recentProducts.title: Recently tracked
recentProducts.description: Your latest products and price changes.
recentProducts.empty: No products yet. Add a URL above to start tracking.

products.subtitle: Manage all products you are tracking.

favorites.subtitle: Products you marked as favorites.
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Add a product to favorites from its detail page.

settings.subtitle: Profile, notifications, security, and appearance.
settings.notificationsDesc: Default alert preferences for new products.

track.q: How do I track a product?
track.a: Sign in, paste a product URL on the dashboard, and configure your alert rules on the product detail page.

alerts.a: Set percentage or fixed amount triggers and choose how often we check prices. You will be notified when conditions are met.

marketplaces.a: Amazon, Trendyol, N11, and Walmart are supported in this release.

account.a: Yes. Price tracking is available for registered members only. Create a free account to get started.

product.notFoundDesc: This product is not in your watchlist.
product.alertSettingsDesc: Choose how and when you want to be notified.

channels.unsupportedMessage: SMS and phone call alerts are not supported yet. Please use email or push notifications for now.

product.frequencyHint: You receive periodic price updates at this interval.
product.priceChangeAlertsHint: In addition to periodic updates, get instant alerts when your drop/rise rules are met.
product.triggersHint: All fields are optional. Leave blank to alert on any price change.
